description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk with a square base and a tapering shaft, featuring multiple decorative reliefs and engraved panels on its surfaces. The obelisk is constructed from weathered stone, giving it a light beige to brown coloration with visible signs of aging and moss growth near the base. Ornamental garlands and floral motifs are present near the top, while the midsection displays circular medallions and framed panels, some of which appear to contain inscriptions. The base is robust and slightly wider, with beveled edges and additional decorative elements, including a leafy plant growing at one corner. The tip of the obelisk is capped with a stepped, pyramidal structure adorned with further relief work. This monument is typically found in parks, plazas, or historical urban settings, serving as a commemorative or decorative landmark.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with ornate reliefs, engraved panels, and a robust square base, capped by a decorative pyramidal tip. Moss and plant growth are visible at the base, adding to its aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main engraved panel, ornate garlands near the top, and dense plant growth at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a circular medallion relief and less prominent engravings, with a more angular perspective of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying another medallion relief, less detailed engravings, and visible moss at the lower section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a blank or lightly engraved panel, minimal ornamentation, and some moss at the base.
attribute_inscription: Several engraved panels are visible, especially on the front and sides, but the text is not legible in the images. The inscriptions appear to be in a serif style, possibly commemorative.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative garlands and floral motifs are present near the top, with circular medallion reliefs and framed panels on the midsection. The ornamentation is classical and symmetrical.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, robust, and slightly wider than the shaft, featuring beveled edges and additional relief work. Moss and a leafy plant are growing at one corner, adding to the aged look.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is capped with a stepped, pyramidal structure adorned with ornamental reliefs and a flat top, giving it a distinguished finish.
attribute_surrounding_features: Vegetation, including moss and a leafy plant, is present at the base. No other surrounding features are visible.
